title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF ANOLID BARRIO SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MALASIQUI, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, TO GENARO ARMAS MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5853 / 60 OG No. 49, 8097 (December 7, 1964)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3980, June 18, 1964 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF ANOLID BARRIO SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MALASIQUI, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, TO GENARO ARMAS MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Anolid Barrio School in the Municipality of Malasiqui, Province of Pangasinan, is hereby changed to Genaro Armas Memorial School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1964.
